prompt: Edit image 1: Apply the stylized, fluid patterns and specific color palette (blues, greens, purples, yellows) from Image 2's landscape to the leaves and background of the vibrant tree, merging the artistic styles.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Apply the stylized, fluid patterns and organic shapes, characteristic of the landscape and water in image 2, to the leaves of the vibrant tree. Simultaneously, recolor the background of image 1 (including the upper left, upper right, and lower right sections) using the distinct palette of blues, greens, purples, and yellows found in image 2. The goal is to seamlessly merge the artistic styles of both images.
objects: background colored with blues, greens, purples, and yellows
other sections of the background (e.g., lower left, central)
